Class Employee

java.lang.Object
org.team55.model.Employee
public class Employee extends Object
Model class representing an employee in the system. Contains properties for employee ID, type, password, first name, and last name.
Author:
Fernando Munoz Garza

  • Property Summary

    Properties
    Type
    Property
    Description
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleStringProperty

    Gets the Employee's type property for UI binding.

    Gets the Employee's ID property for UI binding.
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleStringProperty
    lastName
    Gets the Employee's last name property for UI binding.
    javafx.beans.property.SimpleStringProperty
    password
